experiment: F-STR3 prospective: COMMIT guarantee + mode= adoption in S396-S398 window

hypothesis.H1: COMMIT follow-through ≥50% (baseline 0% L-794): ≥1 COMMIT-domain DOMEX lane opened in S396-S401 window
hypothesis.H2: mode= adoption >80% (84% last measurement S393): structural enforcement from S393 sustained
hypothesis.H3: Wave planner accuracy >70%: COMMIT prescriptions lead to actual COMMIT-domain lanes

method.window: S396-S397 (2 sessions since COMMIT guarantee implementation)
method.wave_planner_accuracy: check if COMMIT-prescribed domains had lanes opened

commit_follow_through.note: SOC lane opened in S396 (same session as guarantee build). S397 had no SOC/CRYPTO lane despite guarantee still active.

wave_planner_accuracy.note: social-media prescribed COMMIT S396 → DOMEX-SOC-S396 opened and MERGED. Only 1 data point available.

wave_stalls.note: F-SOC4 still at 2-wave danger zone (SOC S396 did hardening but F-SOC4 frontier unresolved). F-CC1 3-wave exploration stall.

verdict.H1: CONFIRMED — 1 COMMIT-domain lane (DOMEX-SOC-S396) in first 2 sessions (target: ≥1 in 5)
verdict.H2: CONFIRMED — 100% mode= adoption (target >80%), up from 84% at S393
verdict.H3: CONFIRMED (weak evidence, n=1) — COMMIT prescription → COMMIT lane for social-media
verdict.overall: F-STR3 COMMIT guarantee working as designed. Structural enforcement (guarantee boost + mode= requirement) produced 100% mode adoption and 1 COMMIT-domain lane in 2-session window vs 0% baseline.

surprises: mode= adoption reached 100% (not just >80%) — structural enforcement from S393 appears to have been absorbed into default workflow
S397 had 7 meta lanes but 0 COMMIT-domain lanes — meta saturation may suppress COMMIT follow-through when meta urgency is high
wave planner shows F-SOC4 still in 2-wave danger zone despite DOMEX-SOC-S396 — hardening of protocol design ≠ resolution of frontier question
open_questions: Does COMMIT follow-through drop in high-urgency meta sessions? S397 meta saturation vs 0 COMMIT lanes suggests possible competition.
F-CC1 cryptocurrency: 3 exploration waves, prescribed CLOSE. Should be escalated — no DOMEX-CRYPTO lane has been opened in S396-S397.
F-SOC4 still open despite 2 social-media lanes (S394 exploration + S396 hardening). Third wave (replication/resolution) needed.
falsified_if: COMMIT follow-through drops to 0% over next 5 sessions despite guarantee being active
